testcase.name: failsToDemonstrateJUnitAnnotations()

failure.message: java.lang.AssertionError: Response content Expected: a string containing "NOT_GONK" but: was "*Low mechanical hum* GONK. I am a power droid. My batteries are fully charged. GONK."

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Response content Expected: a string containing "NOT_GONK" but: was "*Low mechanical hum* GONK. I am a power droid. My batteries are fully charged. GONK." at org.hamcrest.MatcherAssert.assertThat(MatcherAssert.java:20) at org.springframework.test.web.servlet.result.ContentResultMatchers.lambda$string$3(ContentResultMatchers.java:141) at org.springframework.test.web.servlet.MockMvc$1.andExpect(MockMvc.java:214) at com.victor.paymentreporting.app.PowerDroidControllerTest.failsToDemonstrateJUnitAnnotations(PowerDroidControllerTest.java:37) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.junit.platform.commons.util.ReflectionUtils.invokeMethod(ReflectionUtils.java:728) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at org.gradle.api.internal.tasks.testing.worker.TestWorker.execute(TestWorker.java:60)
